# isJavaEnabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether or not the web view allows Java.

## Declaration

```swift
var isJavaEnabled: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] to indicate that the web view allows Java, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].
title: isJavaEnabled
